description: Harden the stabilized v13 isometric stack by fixing known defects, tightening lifecycle behavior, reducing performance churn, and strengthening regression validation.

userStories.title: Fix scene grid/ruler configuration incompatibility
userStories.description: As a GM, I want scene grid and ruler tooling to behave correctly in isometric scenes so I can configure maps without fallback hacks.
acceptanceCriteria: Reproduce and document the current failure mode from README Known Bugs.
Scene grid/ruler interactions work in isometric scenes without requiring manual canvas redraw workarounds.
No regression in scene background transforms after grid/ruler edits.
Smoke checklist is updated with explicit grid/ruler configuration steps.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Stabilize HUD positioning for token/tile interactions
userStories.description: As a user, I want token and tile HUD controls to appear reliably near the selected object so editing is usable in isometric mode.
acceptanceCriteria: TokenHUD and TileHUD placement is stable across pan/zoom and repeated selection changes.
HUD placement remains correct after scene switch and projection changes.
No overlap regressions on non-isometric scenes.
Smoke checklist captures pass/fail evidence for HUD placement scenarios.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Harden occlusion overlay lifecycle and memory behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want occlusion updates to avoid stale objects and memory churn so long sessions stay performant.
acceptanceCriteria: Occlusion update loop explicitly cleans up and destroys replaced sprites and masks where needed.
Scene changes and canvas teardown leave no stale occlusion containers or orphaned display objects.
Repeated token movement and pan cycles do not continuously grow memory footprint in profiling spot checks.
Performance notes are appended to PERFORMANCE-BASELINE.md.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Harden dynamic tile overlay lifecycle and multi-token behavior
userStories.description: As a player/GM, I want dynamic tile visibility to remain correct during fast interaction, scene transitions, and changing controlled tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic overlay rebuild path cleans up prior cloned sprites deterministically.
Behavior with no controlled token and with rapid control switching is defined and consistent.
Linked-wall visibility remains correct for doors and wall state changes.
Smoke checklist includes multi-token control switching and door toggling cases.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Rationalize sorting pipeline to a single authoritative path
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want one clear sorting strategy so depth ordering is correct without duplicated or conflicting sort writes.
acceptanceCriteria: Sorting responsibilities between _refreshSort wrapper and updateToken/canvasReady document updates are clarified and de-duplicated.
Controlled-token visibility boost remains intact.
No sort jitter or update loops during token movement.
Smoke checklist verifies stable ordering across movement and selection scenarios.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove dead legacy compatibility paths not aligned with v13 support
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want unsupported-version branches and dormant experimental code paths reduced so future changes are safer.
acceptanceCriteria: v11-only runtime paths are removed, isolated, or clearly marked as non-executed legacy code.
Alternative occlusion experiment files are archived from runtime scope or documented as non-production artifacts.
Runtime entry path scripts/main.js is free of ambiguous or misleading commented import options.
README compatibility and limitations text remains accurate after cleanup.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Standardize error and logging behavior with actionable diagnostics
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want runtime diagnostics to be consistent and actionable so debugging production issues is faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-critical runtime errors use structured prefixed logging with context.
Unconditional noisy logs are avoided in normal operation.
Parsing and validation errors, including custom projection input, are surfaced clearly to users.
Smoke checklist includes debug off/on verification for changed areas.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add targeted regression harness for high-risk interactions
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want focused regression coverage around transforms, overlays, and sorting so future releases detect breakage early.
acceptanceCriteria: SMOKE-TEST.md is extended with a high-risk interaction matrix covering projection switch, pan/zoom, scene switch, token control switch, and door state changes.
Release process references these new checks as required evidence.
Baseline performance capture includes at least one long-session stress scenario.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
